Description: Found a Stripe Access Token, posing a risk to payment processing services and sensitive financial data.
Author: wburns02
Message:
Phase 0: CI gate (pytest vs real Postgres), pinned Dockerfile binaries, grading rubric

- ci.yml: lint + pytest against postgres:16 service container (SQLite masked
  prod PG failures before; never again). Live-prod test files excluded.
- Dockerfile: tailscale 1.98.4 + cloudflared 2026.6.0 pinned with sha256
  verification, base image digest-pinned. Build fails on checksum mismatch.
- tests: stale pre_classify expectation updated to eval-backed behavior;
  hardcoded live API key removed from e2e suite (env var + module skip).
- RUBRIC.md: codified re-grade rubric for all seven components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: wburns02
Message:
feat: add OpenGov/ViewPoint Cloud universal permit scraper

Scrapes 214 configured portals via Auth0 implicit grant (Playwright).
One universal token works across all portals.

- Auth: Auth0 domain accounts.viewpointcloud.com, caches token to disk
- Auth fallback chain: --token flag → OPENGOV_TOKEN env → cached token → silent session → credentials
- API: api-east.viewpointcloud.com/v2/{community}/records with date filter
- DB: hot_leads on T430 (100.122.216.15), ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING dedup
- Rate limited: 2s between portals, 1s between pages, 100 records/page
- CLI: --all (214 portals), --community <slug>, --days N, --dry-run, --list, --token

Password reset sent to willwalterburns@gmail.com to refresh Auth0 credentials.
Once reset, update OPENGOV_PASSWORD and run full scrape.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: wburns02
Message:
feat: energy & environmental intelligence scraper — oil/gas, UST, TRI, USDA, EIA

8 new data sources opening the energy industry:
- PA DEP oil/gas wells (Socrata)
- EPA Underground Storage Tanks (30 states)
- EPA Toxic Release Inventory (2022-2023)
- CO COGCC oil/gas wells
- OK Corporation Commission wells
- USDA NASS crop data (5 commodities, county-level)
- EIA state energy production data (oil, gas, electricity)
- BLM mineral leases (federal land)

Creates 4 new tables: oil_gas_wells, underground_storage_tanks,
toxic_releases, agriculture_data, energy_data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
